item.title: research
item.description: Research interests Magnetism of cool stars I investigate magnetic fields of pre main-sequence T Tauri Stars and main sequence M-dwarfs. I work on high-resolution near-infrared spectra obtained with the CRIRES (CRyogenic Infrared Echelle Spectrograph) instrument sitting at the Very Large Telescope in Chile, or optical spectropolarimetry from ESPADONS at the Canada France Hawaii Telescope. I work under the supervision of Oleg Kochukhov and Nikolai Piskunov from Uppsala University, and Gaitee Hussain from the European Southern Observatory.

item.title: A new logo for Svenska astronomiska sällskapet
A sudden change of the global magnetic field of the active M-dwarf AD Leo
item.description: Alexis Lavail, Oleg Kochukhov, and Gregg Wade A poster presented at the Cool Stars 20 conference Useful links PDF version of the poster Link to the paper on ADS Summary of the science in not-so-rigorous language Our aim was to get the first observations ever of a M-dwarf in all four Stokes parameters. This means one gets the intensity spectrum (Stokes I), the circularly polarized spectrum (Stokes V) and the two linearly polarized spectra (Stokes Q and U).

item.title: Presentations from the Uppsala-Stockholm PhD days
item.description: 10-11 april 2014, Uppsala Universitet Thursday 10 april 2014 Kai Yan Lee - Reionization and the cosmic dawn Hannes Jensen - Simulating observational probes of reionization Saghar Asadi - Gravitational millilensing as a probe of dark matter on subgalactic scales Beatriz Villarroel Rodriguez - What is an Active Galactic Nuclei? Sarah Jabbari - Origin of solar surface activity and sunspots Alexis Lavail - Investigation of stellar magnetic fields using infrared spectropolarimetry Lisa Rosén - Magnetic fields of cool active stars Naum Rusomarov - Magnetic fields of Ap stars from all four Stokes parameters Friday 11 april 2014 Andreas Sandberg - Observations of Lyman alpha emitting galaxies at low and intermediate redshifts Florent Duval - Lyman alpha radiative transfer in Star-burst Galaxies Johannes Puschnig - Multi-wavelength studies of star-forming galaxies Thøger Juul Rivera-Thorsen - Neutral gas kinematics and geometry in young, starforming galaxies and its impact on Lyman alpha radiation transport Samuel Regandell - Spectral Synthesis for protoplanetary disk models Gianni Cataldi - Observations and modeling of debris disks Sara Lindgren - Accurate spectroscopy of M dwarfs, a possible link to understand planet formation Erik Aronson - Spectroscopic characterization of exoplanetary atmospheres

item.title: about
item.description: Interests A bunch of unsorted keywords reflecting some of the things I do or take interest in. feminism, environment, hiking, vegetables, listener-supported radios, democracy, analog photography, anticipation books, world literature, cycling, trip-hop, downtempo, post-rock, nature, mountains, cross-country skiing, stars, baking pizzas, magnetic fields, dystopias, space, astronomy, robotic exploration, sharing is caring, design, typography. Design Some of my duties at Uppsala University have been to design websites and posters for conferences and outreach events.

item.title: appearances
item.description: 2019 2019.06.17 - STARRY final conference at Leeds (United Kingdom) - talk 2019.04.01 - 1-week science visit and seminar at Université de Montpellier (France) 2018 2018.07.29 - Cool Stars 20 at Boston / Cambridge (USA) - poster 2018.05.14 - SunStars summer school at Banyuls sur Mer (France) 2018.05.01 - 2-week science visit at Université de Montpellier (France) 2017 2017.12.02 - 3-week science visit at ESO Garching (Germany) 2017.

item.title: contact
item.description: If you’d like to get in touch / have any question, feel free to contact me! E-mail LinkedIn Visiting adress: room Å63413, Ångströmlaboratoriet, Lägerhyddsvägen 1, Uppsala
